hooks.command: FEATURES=/Users/macbook/Workspace/Devotts/taskclaw/.taskstate/features-v4.json; PROGRESS=/Users/macbook/Workspace/Devotts/taskclaw/.taskstate/progress-v4.md; [ -f "$FEATURES" ] && [ -f "$PROGRESS" ] && echo 'State files OK' || (echo 'WARNING: missing features-v4.json or progress-v4.md in .taskstate/' && exit 0)
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0

echo 'CONTEXT REMINDER: Read /Users/macbook/Workspace/Devotts/taskclaw/.taskstate/features-v4.json for feature status. Read /Users/macbook/Workspace/Devotts/taskclaw/.taskstate/progress-v4.md for current state. PRD at /Users/macbook/Workspace/Devotts/taskclaw/taskclaw-docs/implementations/prd-full-orchestration/prd-full-orchestration.md. Pick the next FAILING feature and work on it. Commit after completing each feature.'
